use_cases: Navigation menus requiring visual image previews on link hover
Creative portfolio or photography websites with interactive link effects
Modern web interfaces needing animated hover interactions with GSAP
ai_summary: A navigation component featuring animated link hover effects powered by GSAP. When users hover over menu items, images dynamically appear with rotation and positioning animations, creating an engaging visual preview experience. The component renders menu items with corresponding images that animate in on hover, suitable for creative portfolios or modern navigation systems requiring interactive hover states.
